introSection: Stampbanan is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Liseberg in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The lead car has two rows, allowing for a capacity of 14 riders.

fullText:
Stampbanan is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Liseberg in Gothenburg, Västra Götaland, Sweden.

Stampbanan has a single helix.

The lead car has two rows, allowing for a capacity of 14 riders.
